architecture_summary: Add DistributedLeaseAdapterRegistryEvaluator as a pure receipt evaluator above DistributedLeaseClaimPlanner. The evaluator hashes the adapter registry, selected backend capability, and underlying distributed lease claim receipt, then classifies the adapter as adapter_ready, adapter_delegated, or adapter_blocked. SQLite compare-and-swap can be ready as a local contract without mutation, external HTTP gateway can be delegated without HTTP execution, native client adapters block unless production_ready is true, and claim receipt violations block capability admission first. The receipt schema records no-lease-service-call, no-adapter-backend-call, no-authentication, and no-secret flags and is indexed in the governance protocol manifest.
data_model_changes: add DistributedLeaseAdapterCapability for backend kind, adapter mode, fencing-token support, compare-and-swap support, production readiness, required environment, reasons, and metadata
add DistributedLeaseAdapterRegistry for registry id, generated timestamp, capability list, and metadata

add DistributedLeaseAdapterRegistryReceipt for backend capability classification, registry hash, capability hash, claim receipt hash, adapter status, blocked reasons, required controls, no-live-call flags, and receipt hash
rollback_plan: Remove DistributedLeaseAdapterRegistryEvaluator, its receipt schema, protocol manifest entry, protocol document count and rule update, focused tests, proof coverage matrix surface and generated fixture/doc changes, and SDLC evidence artifacts, then rerun schema validation, protocol manifest validation, public repository surface validation, proof coverage matrix validation, focused distributed lease adapter registry tests, SDLC artifact validation, security review validation, release readiness validation, and workspace governance preflight.
migration_plan: No persistence, credential, scheduler, worker, distributed lease backend, deployment, external endpoint, or runtime route migration is required. The change adds a local deterministic registry receipt evaluator and schema only.
